basic_details.job_title: DGFT Chennai Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Directorate General of Foreign Trade (DGFT Chennai) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Young Professional. Candidates with MA, MBA, MCA, M.Com, LLM, B.Tech/BE Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 23-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through DGFT Chennai official website dgft.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Economics, MBA, B.Tech/BE (Mechanical/Chemical/IT/Computer Science), MCA, Masters in Commerce, Masters in Law

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DGFT Chennai Young Professional Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
